'''Zier''' was a member of the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clan and was one of [[Durga Besadii Tai]]'s primary rivals for clan leader in the wake of [[Aruk Besadii Aora]]'s death. He was also Durga's cousin.

==Biography==
When [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] destroyed all opposition to [[Durga Besadii Tai|Durga's]] leadership, Durga made Zier his lieutenant in an effort to keep his enemies as close as possible. He was a skilled [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and kept great track of [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii's]] financial matters, even going so far as to challenge Durga on several occasions when he felt that the Hutt lord was spending too many [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on searching for his [[Aruk Besadii Aora|parent's]] killer.<ref name="Rebel Dawn" />

==Appearances==
